subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who hast sanctified Thyself beyond my comprehension and the understanding of those who profess Thy unity, who are adorned with the robes of certitude, and art exalted above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من تقدس عن عرفانی و عرفان الموحدین الذین حلوا بحلل الایقان و تنزه عن
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
